PROFILE.description: Senior Software Engineer focused on AI/ML systems, distributed architectures, and open-source. arXiv author (STRUM) and maintainer of Octave; I lead projects, mentor engineers, and care about system design, evaluation, and the long-term health of what I build.
anecdotes: I've always had a passion for video games and originally wanted to develop them, which led me to discover a love for technology in general.
My journey through school and past roles has taken me from game prototypes to building distributed AI systems and mentoring engineers.
I'm a lifelong gamer, a drummer, and a car enthusiast—if I'm not coding, you might find me behind a drum kit or at a car meet.

PROJECT_CATEGORIES.label: AI / ML
PROJECT_CATEGORIES.description: Applied machine learning, audio intelligence, and end-to-end ML pipelines.

PROJECT_CATEGORIES.label: Apps & Tools
PROJECT_CATEGORIES.description: Desktop apps, developer tools, and full-stack products shipped end-to-end.

PROJECT_CATEGORIES.label: Open Source
PROJECT_CATEGORIES.description: Contributions to open-source projects and community tooling.

PROJECTS.title: STRUM
PROJECTS.subtitle: Audio-to-Chart ML Pipeline
PROJECTS.description: End-to-end multi-instrument pipeline that converts raw audio into playable Clone Hero / YARG charts for drums, guitar, bass, vocals, and keys — without oracle metadata. Two-stage CRNN drum transcriber + 6-model ensemble lane classifier, 93.9% onset F1 and 85.2% lane F1 on 3,299 community-authored charts.

PROJECTS.title: OCTAVE
PROJECTS.subtitle: Desktop Chart Editor & Auto-Charter
PROJECTS.description: Cross-platform desktop app (Windows / macOS / Linux) that wraps STRUM in a one-click "audio to playable chart" workflow with a 2D piano-roll editor and live 3D highway preview. Bundles a self-contained Python runtime, PyTorch, Demucs, and Whisper inside the Electron app — 100% local inference. 98 releases shipped.

PROJECTS.title: YARG Online Multiplayer
PROJECTS.subtitle: Networking layer for an open-source rhythm game
PROJECTS.description: Designed and built the first online multiplayer implementation for YARG (1k+ stars, 80+ contributors). LiteNetLib transport with NAT punch-through and relay-server fallback so peers behind restrictive routers can connect without manual port forwarding. Dockerized dedicated server deployed via docker-compose and Fly.io with a GitHub Actions CI pipeline.

PROJECTS.title: Turtle Recognition
PROJECTS.subtitle: Computer Vision for the Toledo Zoo
PROJECTS.description: Built a turtle individual-identification system for the Toledo Zoo to track endangered Blanding's turtles in the wild. Trained a CNN over a curated dataset of plastron (shell-underside) photos to identify individual turtles from new field photos, enabling non-invasive longitudinal tracking for the Zoo's conservation program.

PROJECTS.title: 2D Action Platformer
PROJECTS.subtitle: Unreal Engine 5 prototype
PROJECTS.description: Side-scrolling action platformer prototype built in Unreal Engine 5 with custom 2D character movement, attack combos, and enemy AI. Exploration project for learning UE5's Paper2D / Paper ZD workflow, gameplay-ability system, and Blueprint-to-C++ patterns.

PROJECTS.title: Bot-Cleaner
PROJECTS.subtitle: Discord moderation bot
PROJECTS.description: Discord bot that automatically detects and removes spam / bot accounts from servers using heuristic and rate-based signals. Slash-command driven, configurable per-guild, and deployable as a long-running Node service.

EXPERIENCES.description: Architecting LLM-driven document intelligence pipelines and distributed event-driven systems. Leading engineers and shaping the architectural direction of internal AI systems.
bullets: Architected LLM-driven IDP pipelines for prior-authorization workflows, — enabling structured data extraction from unstructured PDFs, EHR forms, and clinical documents using OCR and Azure AI.
Architected a distributed Elixir + Azure Service Bus + Kafka event-driven platform improving sponsorship accuracy by 50% (+$7.8M annual revenue).
Architected a rules engine executing against 1M+ requests/day using Redis and the Rete algorithm.
Designed and implemented a Node.js experimentation platform with feature toggling, logging, and custom user filtering.
Designed an enterprise-wide system-architecture change supporting a core data model migration; led the innovation day that originated it.
Stood up a SOX-compliant Azure Functions platform with Terraform + reusable GitHub Actions workflows and dynamic per-PR test environments (Functions, Blob Storage, VNets, Service Bus).
Rewrote a legacy PHP web application in React using the Remix framework.
Led development of APIs handling 5K+ req/min and frontend systems serving 140K+ req/min.
Delivered an internal talk on AI Agents & AI Factories, shaping the architectural direction of internal AI systems.
Mentored 7+ engineers on system design, cloud best practices, and career growth.

EXPERIENCES.description: Led API architecture and team development across multiple data domains, partnering directly with business stakeholders.
bullets: Stood up a GraphQL API using AWS AppSync to consolidate API calls and obscure sensitive data; reduced response times by 15%.
Designed architecture models for multiple microservices, including a serverless microservice.
Architected and ran digital A/B experiments across multiple large applications using Adobe Target, working directly with business partners to drive the rate experiments were kept in production.
Mentored and trained 9 engineers on cloud, best practices, languages, and architectural design; cross-trained developers and testers to remove silos.
Led planning sessions to scope future team initiatives and aligned architecture with measurable business outcomes.

EXPERIENCES.description: Owned high-throughput API delivery and CI/CD pipeline design.
bullets: Designed and implemented document storage in AWS S3 for an Angular site.
Led the team's shift to a DevOps model by designing fully automated CI/CD pipelines with monitoring and reporting.
Designed and implemented APIs handling 100,000+ calls per hour; delivered a custom Node.js OAS validator improving API quality by 70%.
Built a dynamic Angular site backed by Contentful as the content-management service.
Did live demonstrations for multiple teams on how to design and build CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCES.description: Built internal developer tooling for API governance.
bullets: Wrote Java back-end services for business logic and database connections in an agile/Scrum team; used Angular 8 on the front end.
Containerized applications with Docker and deployed them across Kubernetes clusters.
Stood up CI/CD pipelines with Concourse and Jenkins plus a Ruby automated test suite for APIs.
Wrote Python and Node.js scripts to transfer data during an application rewrite.
Stood up an AWS RDS Postgres database using Liquibase for schema migrations.
Created an internal Angular SPA for 200+ APIs supporting developer access control.

EXPERIENCES.description: Built developer-facing tooling and authentication infrastructure.
bullets: Worked on the agile team responsible for Nationwide's developer portal.
Created and maintained enterprise-level APIs in Apigee and stood up CRUD endpoints in Java Spring Boot.
Containerized multiple apps with Docker and hosted them on AWS Kubernetes.
Built automated deployment pipelines in Concourse so the team could ship more frequently.
Built 7 Apigee services for auth workflows with automated Concourse deployments.

EXPERIENCES.description: Built an AR mobile app integrating real-world data from government APIs.
bullets: Built "Public Places" — an Android/iOS AR app that uses augmented reality to help users find the nearest public place (hospital, airport, fire department, school, etc.).
Created a companion JavaScript site using Chart.js to surface usage and track user data for the Public Places app.

EXPERIENCES.description: First exposure to production cloud infrastructure.
bullets: Joined the agile team responsible for Nationwide's developer portal as a summer intern.
Shadowed senior engineers and shipped first production code into Java Spring Boot services running on AWS.
Learned the team's CI/CD and container workflow (Concourse, Docker, Kubernetes) and contributed small pipeline improvements.

POSTS.excerpt: End-to-end multi-instrument pipeline that converts raw audio into playable Clone Hero / YARG charts without oracle metadata. Two-stage CRNN drum transcriber plus a 6-model ensemble lane classifier; 93.9% onset F1 and 85.2% lane F1 on 3,299 community-authored charts.
